name: grimoire
description: Plugin marketplace for the grimoire ecosystem. Distributes the in-repo grimoire plugin — a setup skill that wires the grimoire CLI into Claude Code and drops a generic CLI cheat sheet into your global CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: grimoire
plugins.description: Wire the grimoire CLI — a SQLite + sqlite-vec semantic datastore — into Claude Code. Ships a setup skill that checks the install, initializes a mount, and drops a generic CLI cheat sheet into your global CLAUDE.md so future sessions don't burn tokens rediscovering grimoire's surface.
